ts-fundamentals.title: TypeScript Fundamentals
ts-fundamentals.description: Core TypeScript practice: typing patterns, async, refactor, security, testing, a11y, architecture, and design.

js-fundamentals.title: JavaScript Fundamentals
js-fundamentals.description: Vanilla JavaScript practice: this binding, closures, deep cloning, async refactors, testing pure functions, array-method idioms.

csharp-fundamentals.title: C# Fundamentals
csharp-fundamentals.description: C# practice across typing, async, collections, performance, testing, refactoring, security, architecture, and a11y.

ts-rxjs.title: TypeScript: RxJS Operators
ts-rxjs.description: Reactive programming practice: pipe, common operators (map/filter/switchMap/debounceTime), subjects, multicasting, error recovery, and unsubscription discipline.
